provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Tourism Organisation Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Tourism Organisation and its Board
provisions.title: Establishment of Botswana Tourism Organisation
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Botswana Tourism Organisation
(1) There is hereby established an organisation to be known as Botswana Tourism Organisation which shall be a body corporate with a common seal, capable of suing and being sued in its own name and, subject to the provisions of this Act, of doing or performing all such acts or things as bodies corporate may, by law, do or perform.
(2) All rights, obligations, assets and liabilities which have accrued to the Botswana Tourism Board in terms of the repealed Act shall, upon this Act coming into force, simultaneously pass and accrue to Botswana Tourism and be dealt with in terms of this Act.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Tourism Organisation and its Board
provisions.title: General powers and functions of Botswana Tourism

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Tourism Organisation and its Board
provisions.title: Board of Directors

definitions.definition: the Board of Directors established under section 5
the Botswana Tourism Organisation established under section 3
the Chief Executive officer of Botswana Tourism Organisation appointed as such under section 18
to assign a symbol in accordance with the criteria prescribed for the grading and classification of tourist enterprises, and "re-grade" shall have a corresponding meaning
a member of the Board appointed under section 5
any employee of Botswana Tourism Organisation who holds a position which is designated as such by the Board
